title: Mustardy Fish Tacos
description: A twist on traditional fish tacos with a tangy mustardy sauce. Serve with crispy slaw and warm tortillas.
instructions: 2. Season fish with salt and grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the slaw by combining shredded cabbage, carrots, and cilantro in a bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together lime juice and mustardy sauce.
5. Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble tacos by placing cooked fish on a tortilla, topping with slaw, and drizzling with lime-mustardy sauce.
7. Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.
